subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who manifested Him Who was manifested, when He was manifested, through that which was manifested in that which appeared, and Who hath ever remained sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر من ظهر لما ظهر بما ظهر فیما ظهر و لم یزل کان مقدسا من
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
